name: vault
description: Raw-first Obsidian vault manager. Classify captures, route sources, manage ideas/projects, and maintain index/log.

interface.longDescription: Operate an Obsidian vault with source-first capture routing, idea/project lifecycle management, optional research synthesis, and index/log maintenance.
defaultPrompt: Initialize a raw-first vault structure in this folder.
Categorize source captures from raw/sources and move them to the right vault locations.
Refresh index and append a structured operation log entry.
